Hyperlipidemia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of hyperlipidemia (e.g., hypercholseterolemia) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
